title: Better Skiply QR Code Integration
excerpt: So we are a small inventory department and are trying to integrate skiply qr inventory system. I’ve used the software to help scan and count our current stock. We have different departments that request stock from our de…

posts.author: scottym (Scott Mossburg)
posts.cookedHtml: So we are a small inventory department and are trying to integrate skiply qr inventory system. I’ve used the software to help scan and count our current stock. We have different departments that request stock from our department. Im trying to figure out and automation, or integration that lets our other departments scan a qr code and then request a certain amount of that stock, and then for it to be fufilled.

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi - Triggerly is a monday.com solution for QR code item tracking - Trigger monday.com board action - changing status, opening the item or changing item valued.
